translation.heroDescription: My specialty as a front-end developer is creating smooth and intuitive user experiences. I'm excellent at utilizing the latest technologies to deliver top-notch web applications. I have extensive knowledge in Front-End, which allows me to easily build complex and dynamic applications.
translation.aboutSectionTitleDescription: Info about me, my work, and tech skills can be found here.
translation.aboutIntro1p: Hey there! I started learning web development in 2020 and since then I have been improving my <0>skills and knowledge</0> in this field, creating beautiful and responsive user interfaces, writing clean and maintainable code, also scalable and easy to understand.
translation.aboutIntro2p: My goal as a developer is to keep learning and growing in my skills and knowledge. I'm excited to <0>collaborate</0> with other developers, designers and clients to create innovative and impactful web projects.
translation.aboutIntro3p: If you are interested in <0>working with me</0>, please feel free to get in touch! I'm always open to new <0>opportunities</0> and challenges in the world of web development.
translation.worksProjectDescription: Open source, projects, web apps<0 />and experimentals.
translation.worksArticlesDescription: Learning record. Moving thoughts. Registered experiences.
translation.contactSectionTitleDescription: Got a question, proposal or just want to say hello? Go ahead.
